problem: What causes normal proteins to misfold into prions and spread through tissue?
mechanism: Microbiome modulation via targeted bacteriophage therapy
hypothesis: Combining Microbiome modulation via targeted bacteriophage therapy with current standard of care could unlock function improves by addressing existing therapies only treat symptoms.

experiment.protocol: Randomized controlled trial Phase I with 18 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: Real knowledge is to know the extent of one's ignorance. — Confucius
